lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission function reliably and have been well-maintained. The exterior is clean but has a few minor surface scratches. The interior is well-kept and shows light wear from normal use.
Fair condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs and shows extensive wear and damage to both the interior and exterior.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior has extensive paint oxidation, several deep scratches, and visible rust on the lower body panels. Inside, the interior shows heavy wear with torn upholstery and some non-functional dashboard controls. Mechanically, the car has a persistent engine oil leak, the transmission is slipping, and the suspension is very worn. It is being sold as-is and would best serve as a restoration project or a source for parts.

Looking for a rewarding project or a budget-friendly parts car? This vehicle is ready for a new chapter! It's in rougher shape and will need significant mechanical and cosmetic work, but it's a fantastic opportunity for a restoration enthusiast or anyone handy with a wrench. Grab a bargain and bring your vision to this diamond in the rough!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently suffers from significant mechanical issues, including a failing head gasket and a transmission that struggles to engage reverse. The exterior shows its age with extensive paint peeling, rust spots on the wheel arches, and a cracked windshield. Inside, the cabin has seen better days, with stained carpets and a broken infotainment screen. This car would be best suited for someone looking for a major project or a source for spare parts.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, it offers a seamless blend of performance and comfort. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and long-term reliability. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking value without compromise.

Hey everyone! I’m so excited to find a new home for this absolute gem of a car! It’s been so reliable and still looks fantastic inside and out. It’s been really well-loved and is totally ready to hit the road with its next owner. If you're looking for a dependable, comfy ride that still feels super fresh, this is definitely the one for you! Shoot me a message if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanical integrity is prioritized, featuring a recently overhauled VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe to ensure chassis longevity under load. The factory limited-slip
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs well.

This well-maintained 2019 luxury SUV strikes the perfect balance between daily utility and refined comfort. The exterior paint retains a beautiful shine, showing only minor, expected road wear from careful use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the leather seating is in great shape with no tears, and the high-tech infotainment system works flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is robust and reliable, benefiting from a documented service history and recent multi-point inspection. With a smooth engine and responsive handling, it provides a confident driving experience. It’s a clean, smoke-free vehicle that has been garage-kept and is ready for the road today.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, this unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability. Its refined interior and well-preserved exterior reflect a history of responsible ownership, making it a sophisticated choice for your automotive requirements.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers consistent performance and a sophisticated road presence. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this model ensures long-term reliability and exceptional value. We invite you to experience the refined engineering and superior comfort that define this exemplary pre-owned selection.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for your daily commute or weekend adventures. It runs smooth and looks great—honestly, you're going to love how it handles! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Available is a driver-focused 911 Carrera featuring a mid-cycle 3.6L flat-six powerplant with VarioCam Plus for an optimized torque curve across the rev range. This unit is mated to a precise 6-speed manual transaxle, delivering power to the rear wheels via a mechanical limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a multi-link rear suspension geometry that ensures neutral handling characteristics under high lateral G-loads. Stopping power is managed by four-piston monobloc calipers over cross-drilled rotors. Meticulously maintained with consistent fluid intervals, this specimen offers exceptional mechanical integrity and visceral feedback for the purist enthusiast.
Clean title. Routine maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well. Solid daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, superficial character marks consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin remains a refined environment; the upholstery is supple and free of significant wear, while all electronic features—including the navigation system, premium audio, and climate control—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. The engine delivers smooth, responsive power, and the transmission shifts with precision. Recent service includes a fresh oil change, new brake pads, and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. We are including a complete set of service records and both original key fobs to ensure total peace of mind for the next owner.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a commitment to mechanical excellence and aesthetic preservation. Rigorously vetted by our senior technicians, this model offers a seamless driving experience and remains in a highly commendable state. It represents a premier opportunity for the professional buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber motorcar that balances sophisticated performance with exceptional value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure consistent operational performance and long-term reliability. Offering a superior balance of sophistication and value, it represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber pre-owned automobile.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolute gold to drive! It's in really solid shape, super reliable, and has been well-loved over the years. Whether you're heading on a weekend road trip or just cruising around town, this car is ready for its next big adventure with you. I’ve kept it clean and it's running great—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies for exceptional throttle response. The high-revving powerplant is paired with a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. Recent comprehensive maintenance includes a VANOS system refresh and essential subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. Suspension geometry remains tight with upgraded bushings, while the braking system retains strong initial bite. While showing minor signs of road use consistent with its history, the mechanical vitals are synchronized for peak performance, offering a pure analog experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance. Ready to drive.

Experience the perfect balance of luxury and performance with this meticulously maintained 2018 Porsche Macan. The exterior, finished in a sophisticated Volcano Grey Metallic, retains a deep luster with only minor cosmetic imperfections expected from regular, respectful road use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort, featuring premium black leather upholstery that remains supple and well-preserved. This vehicle is mechanically sound, having undergone consistent scheduled maintenance with a full service history available for your peace of mind. Equipped with the Premium Package Plus, you'll enjoy a panoramic glass roof, Bose surround sound, and heated/ventilated front seats. It drives smoothly, shifts crisply, and offers the reliable, engaging experience you expect from the brand. Ideal for those seeking a high-quality SUV that has been cared for with genuine pride.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, the automobile has been serviced to exacting standards to ensure continued reliability and performance. Its history reflects responsible ownership, resulting in a vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional value. We invite you to experience a machine that upholds our commitment to quality and automotive excellence.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver. Exhibiting consistent mechanical stewardship and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit offers a sophisticated synthesis of performance and long-term value. Having passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection to verify its structural and operational integrity, it stands as a testament to disciplined ownership. We invite you to experience a vehicle that balances refined presentation with proven reliability.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape—very well-loved and runs like a dream! Perfect for anyone looking for a dependable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I've taken great care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin!

This E92 M3 is a mechanically sound example of the legendary S65-powered platform. The 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 pulls hard to its 8,400 RPM redline, paired with a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. Key preventative maintenance—including rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service—has been completed to ensure engine longevity. The chassis retains its composure via Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a functional M Variable Differential Lock. While the finish shows minor road-wear consistent with its driver-focused history, the powertrain remains exceptionally visceral and the subframe integrity is verified. A true enthusiast-spec vehicle optimized for performance.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs well.

Experience the perfect blend of performance and reliability with this meticulously maintained vehicle. Finished in a classic, deep metallic gloss, the exterior retains its luster with only minor, age-appropriate road wear that doesn't detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin featuring premium upholstery that remains supple and supportive, showing only gentle signs of use. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; it has been serviced religiously at scheduled intervals, ensuring the engine pulls strong and the transmission shifts seamlessly. With a clean title and a recent professional detail, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence. It’s a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking quality and longevity.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and preservation. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience suitable for the discerning motorist. Our rigorous inspection process confirms that this unit remains a dependable asset, providing exceptional long-term value and sophisticated road presence.
